name: Pulse Board
description: Operational heartbeat for your agent stack. Every cron job, one digest.

modifies: user crontab (adds digest schedule and wrapped skill entries)
~/.openclaw/shared/secrets/openclaw-secrets.env (appends missing keys only, with explicit user consent)

external_endpoints: api.telegram.org (only if Telegram delivery is configured)
discord.com (only if Discord delivery is configured)

credentials.secrets_env_note: install.sh may append LLM_API_KEY=ollama and OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE to your secrets env file — only with your explicit confirmation at install time.

privacy.llm_composition: When LLM digest is enabled, the raw pending.log is included in the prompt sent to the configured OpenClaw agent. If that agent uses a remote/cloud LLM provider, log content will be transmitted off-host. Review your agent configuration (openclaw agents list) before enabling. Use a local-only agent (e.g. Ollama) if log privacy is required.
privacy.secrets_in_logs: Pulse Board cannot prevent plugged cron jobs from writing secrets into their stdout/stderr. Ensure plugged jobs do not echo credentials into their outputs.
